# Georgia Metric Books Map

> Interactive historical atlas of 19th–early 20th century Georgian parish metric books (1819–1930). Search settlements, churches, and uezds; explore neighbouring parishes within 10 km.

The project digitises and geolocates parish registers from the National Historical Archive of Georgia (Fond 489, Inventory 6). The interface is available in Russian, English, and Georgian.

## Pages

- [Home / Landing](/): project overview, languages, entry points to the map.
- [Interactive map](/map): full atlas with search, filters by region/uezd/period, and 10 km radius analysis.
- [Embeddable map](/embed): lightweight version of the map for embedding on third-party sites.

## Optional

- [Live site](https://metrics.datatells.info)
- [Mirror](https://georgia-metric-books.lovable.app)
